title: The Green Chamber of Linnais
writer: Usko Kemppi, Sakari Topelius, Valentin Vaala
actors: Rauli Tuomi, Regina Linnanheimo, Kaija Rahola
plot: A nobleman in 1830's Finland has to contend with stuck-up relatives, his daughters' suitors, dark secrets from his family's past, mistaken identities and a haunted wing of his mansion.
